acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Command executor is injectable for tests.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: CommandExecutor trait and HyprlandClient<E>; crates/hyprland/tests/fixtures.rs uses FixtureExecutor.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Fixture-backed tests cover monitor and workspace parsing.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: crates/hyprland/tests/fixtures.rs reads fixtures/hyprland/monitors.json, workspaces.json, and activeworkspace.json.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Errors are typed and preserve command context.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: HyprlandErrorKind plus CommandContext; parse_errors_preserve_command_context test asserts hyprctl arguments are retained.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No product code shells out directly except through the command layer.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: rg -n "std::process::Command|Command::new" crates apps returns only crates/hyprland/src/command.rs.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No new third-party dependency policy exception is required.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: nix develop -c just security passes; cargo-vet reports no third-party dependencies after replacing serde/serde_json with a focused internal parser.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Command-layer node only; live Hyprland socket and hardware lifecycle behavior are deferred.

resolvedFindings.title: Third-party JSON dependencies removed
resolvedFindings.observed: The initial implementation added serde/serde_json, which introduced third-party dependency review work outside this node's policy budget.
resolvedFindings.expected: The Hyprland command-layer node should not require a new third-party dependency policy exception.
resolvedFindings.summary: Initial implementation added serde/serde_json, which violated current dependency policy. The command layer now uses a dependency-free parser and just security passes.
